title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates!
